_README: List of customer photos / unboxing videos shown in the #InkAndChaiBookstagram strip on EVERY product page. Drop new entries in the items[] array; rebuild picks them up. Schema at the bottom.

items.caption: Different genres · Large collection to choose from
❤️ A note from one of our readers

_schema.src: Path under /public (e.g. /videos/file.mp4) OR full https:// URL
_schema.poster: Optional thumbnail (path or URL); auto-extracted from first frame if browser supports it
_schema.caption: 1-line caption shown over the card
_schema.instagram: Optional Instagram permalink — adds an 'View on Instagram' chip
